material_records.label: Raw authority access and refresh tokens
permitted_components: Controlled authority gateway by opaque ref only
material_records.persistence_form: vault-held token bundle keyed by token_binding_ref and binding lineage
material_records.rotation_or_revalidation: Renew on provider token lifecycle, bind to the registered client, and revoke or rotate on authority-link invalidation.

material_records.label: Sandbox provider client credentials
permitted_components: Controlled authority gateway configuration by opaque ref
material_records.persistence_form: versioned client_id and client_secret record partitioned by sandbox profiles
material_records.rotation_or_revalidation: Export to the vault immediately after issuance and rotate on environment refresh or provider policy changes.

material_records.label: Production provider client credentials
permitted_components: Controlled authority gateway configuration by opaque ref
material_records.persistence_form: versioned client_id and client_secret record partitioned by production profiles
material_records.rotation_or_revalidation: Export to the vault on issuance, attach live rotation evidence, and never co-store with sandbox credentials.

forbidden_components: Browser and portal surfaces as mutable credentials
Queue and broker as bearer material
material_records.label: Token-binding, authority-link, and binding-lineage references
material_records.persistence_form: AuthorityBinding and audit lineage refs only
material_records.rotation_or_revalidation: Every live send revalidates token version, access_binding_hash, policy_snapshot_hash, and authority_link lineage.

forbidden_components: Queue-only storage without durable control-plane copy
material_records.label: Request hashes, duplicate meaning keys, and idempotency keys
material_records.persistence_form: sealed request identity fields and canonical hashes
material_records.rotation_or_revalidation: Derived from 31 frozen request identity fields and reused across resend legality, duplicate suppression, and audit.

forbidden_components: Browser and portal surfaces as direct header composers
General logs with raw fraud-header payloads
material_records.label: Fraud-prevention header profiles and callback host configuration
permitted_components: Profile matrix and provider configuration store
material_records.persistence_form: versioned provider-profile bindings with environment partitioning
material_records.rotation_or_revalidation: Profile changes invalidate affected send paths and require provider-profile separation by environment.

forbidden_components: Read-side projection as a settlement surrogate
Transport-local memory as the only copy
material_records.label: Authority ingress proof and correlation packet
material_records.rotation_or_revalidation: Reused across normalization, settlement mutation, replay, and restore rather than re-derived from raw callbacks.

forbidden_components: Read-side projection as the authoritative copy
material_records.label: Response history, resend legality, and reconciliation control
material_records.rotation_or_revalidation: Updated when new authority evidence arrives and reused during restore or worker reclaim before any live resend.
